start.text: You've always been fascinated by the sea and its secrets. As a young marine biologist, you've spent countless hours studying the ocean and its creatures. One day, while on a research vessel in the middle of the Atlantic, you receive a distress signal from a nearby island. The signal is weak and unclear, but it seems to be a call for help. The captain of the vessel decides to investigate, and you're invited to join the expedition. As you approach the island, you notice that it's shrouded in a thick fog. The vessel drops anchor, and you take a small boat to explore the island.

choices.text: Investigate the source of the distress signal
Explore the island's coastline and look for any signs of danger

signal_source.text: You trek through the dense jungle, following the faint signal. The air is thick with humidity and the sounds of exotic birds and animals. As you push through the underbrush, you come across a small clearing and find a damaged radio transmitter. It's clear that someone or something was trying to send out a distress signal, but it looks like they've either fled or are no longer able to transmit.

choices.text: Search the perimeter of the clearing for any signs of the person who sent the signal
Try to fix the radio transmitter to see if you can get a clearer message

coastline_exploration.text: As you make your way along the coastline, you notice that the island seems to be uninhabited, but there are signs of recent human activity. You see a piece of torn fabric caught in a bush and what looks like a makeshift shelter in the distance. You approach the shelter and find a small cache of supplies, including food, water, and a first aid kit.

choices.text: Take some of the supplies and continue exploring the island
Investigate the makeshift shelter further to see if you can find any clues about the person who made it

search_perimeter.text: You carefully search the perimeter of the clearing, looking for any signs of the person who sent the signal. As you move through the jungle, you notice that the underbrush is disturbed, and there are faint footprints leading deeper into the island. You follow the footprints, which lead you to a small cave.

choices.text: Enter the cave to see if you can find any signs of the person
Return to the clearing and try to fix the radio transmitter

fix_transmitter.text: You try to fix the radio transmitter, but it's clear that it's beyond your technical expertise. As you're working on it, you hear a faint noise coming from deeper in the jungle. It's hard to make out what it is, but it sounds like someone or something is moving through the underbrush.

choices.text: Investigate the noise and see what's making it
Stay with the transmitter and hope that the person who sent the signal returns

explore_island.text: You take some of the supplies and continue exploring the island. As you move through the jungle, you come across a small stream and follow it to see where it leads. The stream takes you to a small waterfall, and behind the waterfall, you find a hidden cave.

choices.text: Enter the cave to see what's inside
Return to the coastline and explore other parts of the island

shelter_investigation.text: You investigate the makeshift shelter further and find a small journal belonging to someone named 'Alex'. As you flip through the journal, you realize that Alex was stranded on the island after a shipwreck and has been trying to survive for weeks.

choices.text: Keep reading the journal to see if you can learn more about Alex's situation
Search the island to see if you can find any signs of Alex

cave_exploration.text: You enter the cave and find that it's filled with strange rock formations and glittering crystals. As you move deeper into the cave, you hear a faint noise and see a figure in the distance.

choices.text: Approach the figure and try to communicate
Keep a safe distance and observe the figure

investigate_noise.text: You investigate the noise and find that it's a person, injured and disoriented. As you approach them, they look up and you see that it's Alex, the person who wrote the journal.

choices.text: Try to help Alex and tend to their injuries
Ask Alex questions about their situation and how they ended up on the island

wait_for_signal.text: You stay with the transmitter and hope that the person who sent the signal returns. As you wait, you hear the noise getting closer and closer, and suddenly, Alex appears, looking frantic and worried.

choices.text: Try to calm Alex down and figure out what's going on
Tell Alex about the transmitter and ask for their help in fixing it

read_journal.text: You keep reading the journal and learn that Alex has been trying to find a way off the island for weeks. As you read, you come across a passage that mentions a hidden exit from the island.

choices.text: Search the island for the hidden exit
Continue reading the journal to see if you can learn more about the island

search_island.text: You search the island and find some signs of Alex's presence, including a makeshift bed and some abandoned supplies. As you continue searching, you come across a small hut in the distance.

choices.text: Investigate the hut and see if you can find any clues
Return to the shelter and rest for a while

approach_figure.text: You approach the figure and try to communicate. As you get closer, you see that it's Alex, and they look relieved to see you.

choices.text: Ask Alex questions about their situation and how they ended up on the island
Try to help Alex and figure out a way off the island

observe_figure.text: You keep a safe distance and observe the figure. As you watch, you realize that it's Alex, and they seem to be searching for something.

choices.text: Approach Alex and try to communicate
Keep observing Alex and see if you can learn more about their situation

help_alex.text: You try to help Alex and tend to their injuries. As you work, Alex tells you about their situation and how they ended up on the island.

choices.text: Ask Alex questions about their past and what they were doing on the island
Help Alex find a way off the island

question_alex.text: You ask Alex questions about their situation and how they ended up on the island. Alex tells you about the shipwreck and their struggles to survive.

choices.text: Try to help Alex find a way off the island
Ask Alex more questions about their past and what they were doing on the island

calm_alex.text: You try to calm Alex down and figure out what's going on. Alex tells you that they've been searching for a way off the island and are getting desperate.

choices.text: Try to help Alex find a way off the island
Tell Alex about the transmitter and ask for their help in fixing it

tell_alex.text: You tell Alex about the transmitter and ask for their help in fixing it. Alex agrees to help, and together, you manage to fix the transmitter and send out a distress signal.

choices.text: Wait for help to arrive and try to survive on the island
Try to find a way off the island before help arrives

search_exit.text: You search the island for the hidden exit and eventually find a small opening in the rocks. As you make your way through the opening, you find yourself on the other side of the island.

choices.text: Explore the new part of the island and see if you can find any signs of civilization
Return to the shelter and rest for a while

investigate_hut.text: You investigate the hut and find some supplies and a small note that reads: 'Meet me at the cave at midnight. -A'.

choices.text: Go to the cave at midnight to see who it is
Ignore the note and return to the shelter

question_alex_cave.text: You ask Alex questions about their situation and how they ended up on the island. Alex tells you about their struggles to survive and their fears about being stranded.

choices.text: Try to help Alex find a way off the island
Ask Alex more questions about their past and what they were doing on the island

help_alex_cave.text: You try to help Alex and figure out a way off the island. As you work, you realize that you're not alone on the island.

choices.text: Investigate the noise and see who or what it is
Keep working on finding a way off the island with Alex

ask_alex_past.text: You ask Alex questions about their past and what they were doing on the island. Alex tells you about their life before the shipwreck and their goals.

choices.text: Try to help Alex find a way off the island
Ask Alex more questions about their past and what they were doing on the island

help_alex_escape.text: You try to help Alex find a way off the island. As you work, you realize that it's not going to be easy.

choices.text: Keep working on finding a way off the island
Take a break and rest for a while

ask_alex_more.text: You ask Alex more questions about their past and what they were doing on the island. Alex tells you more about their life and their goals.

choices.text: Try to help Alex find a way off the island
Keep asking Alex questions

go_to_cave.text: You go to the cave at midnight and find a person waiting for you. It's Alex, and they look like they've been waiting for a long time.

choices.text: Ask Alex what they're doing here and what they want
Tell Alex that you're trying to find a way off the island and ask for their help

approach_alex_observe.text: You approach Alex and try to communicate. Alex looks up and seems relieved to see you.

choices.text: Ask Alex questions about their situation and how they ended up on the island
Try to help Alex and figure out a way off the island

continue_reading.text: You continue reading the journal and learn more about Alex's situation. You realize that they've been on the island for months and are getting desperate.

choices.text: Search the island for the hidden exit
Return to the shelter and rest for a while

return_shelter.text: You return to the shelter and rest for a while. As you rest, you hear a noise outside and realize that someone or something is approaching.

choices.text: Investigate the noise and see who or what it is
Stay in the shelter and hope that the person or thing goes away

keep_working.text: You keep working on finding a way off the island. As you work, you realize that it's not going to be easy, but you're determined to succeed.

choices.text: Take a break and rest for a while
Keep working on finding a way off the island

explore_new_part.text: You explore the new part of the island and find some signs of civilization. You see a boat in the distance and realize that you might be able to escape.

choices.text: Try to get the boat and escape the island
Return to the shelter and rest for a while

continue_observing.text: You keep observing Alex and see if you can learn more about their situation. As you watch, you realize that they're searching for something.

choices.text: Approach Alex and try to communicate
Keep observing Alex and see if you can learn more about their situation

keep_asking.text: You keep asking Alex questions and learn more about their past and what they were doing on the island.

choices.text: Try to help Alex find a way off the island
Keep asking Alex questions

take_break.text: You take a break and rest for a while. As you rest, you realize that you're getting tired and need to keep going.

choices.text: Keep working on finding a way off the island
Take another break and rest for a while

investigate_noise_cave.text: You investigate the noise and see if you can find any signs of who or what it is. As you move through the cave, you hear a faint noise and see a figure in the distance.

choices.text: Approach the figure and try to communicate
Keep a safe distance and observe the figure

find_way_off.text: You think you see a way off the island. As you move towards it, you realize that it's a boat and you might be able to escape.

choices.text: Try to get the boat and escape the island
Return to the shelter and rest for a while

wait_for_help.text: You wait for help to arrive and try to survive on the island. As you wait, you hear a noise in the distance and see a ship approaching.

choices.text: Try to signal the ship and get their attention
Stay on the island and wait for the ship to arrive

tell_alex_transmitter.text: You tell Alex about the transmitter and ask for their help in fixing it. Alex agrees to help, and together, you manage to fix the transmitter and send out a distress signal.

choices.text: Wait for help to arrive and try to survive on the island
Try to find a way off the island before help arrives

ask_alex_cave_midnight.text: You ask Alex what they're doing here and what they want. Alex tells you that they've been searching for a way off the island and are getting desperate.

choices.text: Try to help Alex find a way off the island
Tell Alex that you're trying to find a way off the island and ask for their help

tell_alex_cave_midnight.text: You tell Alex that you're trying to find a way off the island and ask for their help. Alex agrees to help, and together, you manage to find a boat and escape the island.

choices.text: Escape the island and head back home
Stay on the island and try to survive

escape_island.text: You escape the island and head back home. As you sail away, you realize that you've had an incredible adventure and learned a lot about survival and teamwork.

choices.text: Return home and share your story with others
Keep sailing and explore more of the ocean

stay_on_island.text: You decide to stay on the island and try to survive. As you stay, you realize that you're getting more and more tired and need to find a way off the island.

choices.text: Keep searching for a way off the island
Stay on the island and try to survive

signal_ship.text: You try to signal the ship and get their attention. As you signal, you realize that the ship is getting closer and closer.

choices.text: Keep signaling the ship and try to get their attention
Stay on the island and wait for the ship to arrive

ship_arrives.text: The ship arrives and you get rescued. As you sail away, you realize that you've had an incredible adventure and learned a lot about survival and teamwork.

choices.text: Return home and share your story with others
Keep sailing and explore more of the ocean

return_home.text: You return home and share your story with others. As you share, you realize that you've had an incredible adventure and learned a lot about survival and teamwork.

choices.text: End the story

keep_sailing.text: You keep sailing and explore more of the ocean. As you sail, you realize that there are many more adventures waiting for you.

choices.text: End the story

end_story.text: Congratulations, you've reached the end of the story!

stay_in_shelter.text: You stay in the shelter and hope that the person or thing goes away. As you stay, you realize that you're getting more and more tired.

choices.text: Investigate the noise and see who or what it is
Stay in the shelter and hope that the person or thing goes away

vocabulary.distress signal: a signal sent to ask for help
vocabulary.exiled: sent away from a place, often as a punishment
vocabulary.transmitter: a machine that sends out signals or messages
vocabulary.humidity: the amount of water in the air
vocabulary.underbrush: small trees and bushes in a forest
vocabulary.perimeter: the edge or boundary of something
vocabulary.makeshift: something made to use in an emergency or when something else is not available
vocabulary.cache: a hidden store of food, money, or other valuable things
vocabulary.disoriented: confused and not knowing where you are
vocabulary.glittering: shining brightly with flashes of light
vocabulary.desperate: feeling hopeless and in need of help
vocabulary.hidden exit: a secret way out of a place
